title: Align AI script entry points and complete ADR cleanup
summary: Promoted .NET-named script entry points, updated high-traffic script documentation, and removed duplicate-number ADR files by renumbering valid decisions into unique identifiers.
results: Added .NET-friendly script aliases for projection, config, and test DI checks.
Updated orchestrator scripts to prefer the new names.
Rewrote high-traffic AI script docs around active .NET naming.
Resolved duplicate ADR numbering by promoting valid decisions to ADR-051 and ADR-052.
Removed duplicate-number ADR files that were structurally invalid.
